urls.title: 4Voda | AI That Handles the Boring Stuff
urls.description: Custom AI assistants that automate your admin work.

text: A small law office uses a custom 4Voda AI assistant to send payment links after consultations, auto-remind unpaid invoices at 7 and 14 days, and alert staff only if a client disputes the bill. Faster collections, less awkward follow-up. https://t.co/l7qLvAHxUy
